---
title: "Data Analysis with Python"
subtitle: "Run every walkthrough and exercise right in your web browser — no Python or Jupyter to install."
author: "Dr. Chester Ismay"
format: live-html
engine: markdown
toc: false
---

Welcome! This site lets you run all of the course code **directly in your browser**.
Python runs locally on your own machine via [Pyodide](https://pyodide.org) (WebAssembly) —
there is **nothing to install**, no account to create, and no cloud server involved.

## Two ways to work

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 📝 [Exercises](exercises.qmd)

The live-coding template. Code cells start mostly empty so you can **fill them in as we go**.
Your edits are **saved automatically in this browser**, so you can pick up where you left off.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### ✅ [Solutions](solutions.qmd)

The **completed code** for every walkthrough and exercise. Run any cell to see the output,
or edit a cell to experiment with your own variations.
:::

:::

## How it works

- Click **Run Code** on any code cell to execute it in your browser.
- Run the **import** cell and the **data-loading** cells near the top of a page first, then work top to bottom — later cells reuse variables from earlier ones.
- The **first** cell you run takes a few seconds while Python and the data packages load. After that it's fast.
- The course datasets (`economies.csv`, `populations.csv`, their `.xlsx` versions, and `economies_indexed.csv`) are bundled with the page, so `pd.read_csv(...)` / `pd.read_excel(...)` just work.

::: {.callout-note}
## Need the originals?

The Jupyter notebooks, slides, and data are all in the
[course GitHub repository](https://github.com/ismayc/oreilly-data-analysis-with-python).
You can also run the notebooks on [Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/)
if you prefer a full Jupyter environment.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## Browser support

The in-browser plots need a modern browser (Chrome, Edge, Firefox, or Safari, kept up to date).
If a plot cell shows an `OffscreenCanvas` error, update your browser to the latest version.
:::
